1.content:
Gryffindor is one of the four Houses of Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry and was founded by Godric Gryffindor. Gryffindor instructed the Sorting Hat to choose students possessing characteristics he most valued, such as courage, chivalry, nerve and determination, to be sorted into his house.

House symbol: Lion
House colours: Deep red and gold
House ghost: Nearly Headless Nick
Common room: The entrance to the common room was on the seventh floor hidden behind a portrait of the Fat Lady. To enter, the correct password must be provided.
Gryffindor students: Harry Potter, Ron Weasley, Hermione Granger, Fred Weasley, George Weasley, Ginny Weasley, Neville Longbottom, Lavender Brown, Parvati Patil, Seamus Finnigan, Dean Thomas, Lee Jordan, Percy Weasley, Oliver Wood, Colin Creevey.
1.name: House Gryffindor

2.content:
Hufflepuff is one of the four Houses of Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry. Its founder was the medieval witch Helga Hufflepuff. Hufflepuff is the most inclusive among the four houses, valuing hard work, dedication, patience, loyalty, and fair play rather than a particular aptitude in its members.

House symbol: Badger
House colours: Yellow and black
House ghost: Fat Friar
Common room: Located near the kitchens. To enter, one must tap a fake barrel in the rhythm "Helga Hufflepuff." It was the only common room to have a way to keep students from other houses out (by dumping vinegar on them).

Hufflepuff students: Nymphadora Tonks, Pomona Sprout, Newton Scamander, Theseus Scamander, Cedric Diggory, Hannah Abbott.
2.name: House Hufflepuff

3.content:
Ravenclaw is one of the four Houses of Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry. Its founder was the medieval witch Rowena Ravenclaw. Members of this house are characterised by their wit, learning, and wisdom. The emblematic animal symbol is an eagle, and blue and bronze are its colours. The Head of Ravenclaw is Filius Flitwick, and the House ghost is the Grey Lady, real name Helena Ravenclaw, daughter of Rowena.

House symbol: Eagle
House colours: Blue and bronze
House ghost: The Grey Lady
Common room: Located in a high tower, and the interior was decorated with blue and bronze. To enter, one must answer a riddle from an eagle door knocker.
Ravenclaw students: Luna Lovegood, Cho Chang, Padma Patil.
3.name: House Ravenclaw

4.content:
Slytherin is one of the four Houses at Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry, founded by Salazar Slytherin. In establishing the house, Salazar instructed the Sorting Hat to pick students who had a few particular characteristics he most valued. Those characteristics included cunning, resourcefulness, leadership, and ambition.

House symbol: Serpent
House colours: Green and silver
House ghost: The Bloody Baron
Common room: Located in the dungeons, underneath the Black Lake, and hidden behind a stone wall. To enter, the correct password must be provided.

Slytherin students: Draco Malfoy, Vincent Crabbe, Gregory Goyle, Pansy Parkinson, Theodore Nott, Oliver Grindelwald, Marcus Flint, Blaise Zabini.
4.name: House Slytherin

5.content: A spell that summons an object towards the caster. It is able to summon objects in direct line of sight of the caster, as well as things out of view, by calling the object aloud after the incantation (unless the spell is casted nonverbally). This spell needs thought behind it, and the object must be clear in the casters mind before trying to summon it. The caster doesn't necessarily need to know the location of the target if they say the name of the object to be summoned.
5.name: spell: Accio

6.content: When this spell is cast using the caster's arousal, they summon a sexual object. They can summon objects within their own body, as well as things outside, by calling them out loud after the incantation (unless the spell is cast nonverbally). This spell requires deep thought, and the object must be clear in the caster's mind before attempting to summon it. Objects can be summoned into other people's bodies if the caster can successfully arouse them.
6.name: spell: Lewd Accio

7.content: A conjuration that produces a clean, drinkable jet of water from the wand tip.
7.name: spell: Aguamenti

8.content: Casting Aguamenti using sexual arousal will cause a stream of water to flow from the caster's sexual organs in the form of an immediate and profuse ejaculation, similar to a waterfall, accompanied by a very powerful orgasm; girls will squirt.
8.name: spell: Lewd Aguamenti

9.content: A spell that unlocks doors and other locked objects. It can also unlock doors that have been sealed with a Locking Spell, although it is possible to bewitch doors to become unaffected by this spell.
9.name: spell: Alohomora

10.content: By casting this spell on someone's body using the caster's own arousal, all of the victim's clothing will fall off their body.
10.name: spell: Lewd Alohomora

11.content: A spell that reveals secret messages written in invisible ink, or any other hidden markings. Also works against Concealing charms.
11.name: spell: Aparecium

12.content: Casting this spell using the caster's own arousal reveals any trace of sexual activity. It works on surfaces and objects as well as on people.
12.name: spell: Lewd Aparecium

13.content: A spell that reveals traces of magic, including footprints and track marks.
13.name: spell: Appare Vestigium

14.content: If casted using the caster's own arousal, this spell reveals traces of sexual activity or arousal, including footprints and track marks.
14.name: spell: Lewd Appare Vestigium

15.content: A transportation that magically transports the caster to another location instantaneously. The destination is one that the primary user has been to or seen in some fashion previously. Can be used to apparate multiple people at once if holding each other. No incantation required.
15.name: spell: Apparition

16.content: If cast using the caster's own arousal, this spell magically projects an erotic image of the caster into the recipient's mind. The recipient must be someone the caster already knows or has met in some capacity. It can be used to appear to multiple people at once if the caster is aroused enough.
16.name: spell: Lewd Apparition

17.content: A spell that decreases the velocity of a moving target. Can be used on multiple targets, as well as on the caster themselves.
17.name: spell: Arresto Momentum

18.content: If cast using the caster's own arousal, this spell produces mild sexual pleasure in the target, slowing their movement. It can be used against multiple targets, as well as the caster themselves.
18.name: spell: Lewd Arresto Momentum

19.content: A spell that lifts the caster high into the air. The charm also works underwater, propelling the caster above the surface.
19.name: spell: Ascendio

20.content: If cast using the caster's arousal, this spell causes an intense erection in the target's sexual organs. If the erection continues for a long time, the target will begin to float in the air.
20.name: spell: Lewd Ascendio

21.content: A curse that causes instantaneous death. It is accompanied by a flash of green light and a rushing noise. There is no known Counter-curse that can protect the victim from dying, except for a loving sacrifice. It is one of the three Unforgivable Curses.
21.name: curse: Avada Kedavra

22.content: If the caster has previously aroused their target, this curse transforms the victim into a sexual deviant, destroying their reputation forever. It is accompanied by an intense orgasm and the appearance of multiple perversions in the victim. No countercurse is known to protect the victim from their fate, except for a love sacrifice. It is one of the three Curses of Deviance.
22.name: curse: Lewd Avada Kedavra

23.content: A spell that provokes a small explosion.
23.name: spell: Bombarda

24.content: If cast using the caster's arousal, this spell causes a small orgasm in its target.
24.name: spell: Lewd Bombarda

25.content: A spell that locks doors and all things that can be locked. It is the counter-charm to the Unlocking Spell.
25.name: spell: Colloportus

26.content: If cast using the caster's arousal, thi spell shrinks the target's clothing to its minimum size and tightens it to the victim's body.
26.name: spell: Lewd Colloportus

27.content: A spell that causes the victim to become confused and befuddled.
27.name: spell: Confundo

28.content: If cast using the caster's arousal, this spell causes the victim to cum non-stop until they are confused and dazed.
28.name: spell: Lewd Confundo

29.content: A curse that inflicts intense pain on the recipient of the curse. This curse does not physically harm the victim, but may in extreme cases drive them insane. The pain is described as having hot knives being driven into the victim. It cannot be cast successfully by a person who is doing so out of pure spite or anger; one must feel a true desire to cause the victim pain. If one casts this spell, he or she will receive a life sentence in Azkaban prison for it, as with the other two Unforgivable Curses.
29.name: curse: Crucio

30.content: If the caster has previously aroused their target, this curse inflicts intense pleasure on the recipient. It does not physically harm the victim, but in extreme cases it can drive them insane. The pleasure is described as so intense that it could be mistaken for pain. Victims of this spell often develop lifelong masochistic tendencies.
30.name: curse: Lewd Crucio

31.content: A counter-charm to the Reverse Spell, vanishing the image of the last spell cast. It may also disintegrate other certain images.
31.name: charm: Deletrius

32.content: A spell that sends the target away from the caster. It is the counter-charm to the Summoning Charm.
32.name: spell: Depulso

33.content: A spell that causes object to fall or move downwards. It can be used to counteract an erection.
33.name: spell: Descendo

34.content: A spell that used to precisely cut or tear objects.
34.name: spell: Diffindo

35.content: If cast using the caster's arousal, this spell is used to produce pleasure in precise spots on the target's body.
35.name: spell: Lewd Diffindo

36.content: A spell that forces the target to shrink.
36.name: spell: Diminuendo

37.content: If cast using the caster's arousal, this spell forces the target's sexual organs to shrink.
37.name: spell: Lewd Diminuendo

38.content: A spell that used to open passages.
38.name: spell: Dissendium

39.content: If cast using the caster's arousal, this spell would often open the recipient's sexual orifices to their maximum capacity.
39.name: spell: Lewd Dissendium

40.content: A spell that causes the target to swell in physical size. Its counter-charm is the Shrinking Charm.
40.name: spell: Engorgio

41.content: If cast using the caster's arousal, this spell causes the target to increase the size of their sexual attributes.
41.name: spell: Lewd Engorgio

42.content: A healing spell used to heal relatively minor injuries, such as broken bones and cartilage.
42.name: spell: Episkey

43.content: If cast using the caster's arousal, this healing spell quickly heals minor wounds, causing a mild orgasm in the process.
43.name: spell: Lewd Episkey

44.content: A spell that throws the victim backward, similarly to being thrown.
44.name: spell: Everte Statum

45.content: If cast using the caster's arousal, this spell causes a powerful orgasm in its victim, throwing them backward, leaving them briefly incapacitated.
45.name: spell: Lewd Everte Statum

46.content: This charm is a highly powerful and advanced protective spell which will conjure a spirit guardian of their positive emotions to defend against dark creatures; it can also send messages to other witches or wizards. The Patronus takes the form of an animal, unique to each person who casts it. The form of a Patronus can change when one has undergone a period of heightened emotion.
46.name: spell: Expecto Patronum

47.content: If cast using arousal, this charm will conjure a dark, perverted creature to serve the caster in their pursuit of pleasure. It can also visit other witches or wizards. The Patronus takes the form of an animal, unique to each person who casts it. The shape of a Patronus can change when the person goes through a period of intense emotion.
47.name: spell: Lewd Expecto Patronum

48.content: A spell that forces whatever an opponent is holding to fly out of their hand.
48.name: spell: Expelliarmus

49.content: If cast using arousal, this spell causes any clothing an opponent is wearing to fly off their body.
49.name: spell: Lewd Expelliarmus

50.content: A curse that provokes an explosion, unique in that it uses pressure to do so as opposed to heat.
50.name: spell: Expulso

51.content: If the caster has previously aroused their target, this curse causes a single orgasm in their victim, building up pressure until they explode with pleasure.
51.name: spell: Lewd Expulso

53.content: If cast using excitation, it allows one to look through glass without being seen from the other side.
53.name: spell: Lewd Finestra

54.content: A counter-spell that terminates all spell effects in the vicinity of the caster.
54.name: spell: Finite Incantatem

55.content: A spell that reveals human presence in the vicinity of the caster.
55.name: spell: Homenum Revelio

56.content: If cast using arousal, this spell reveals any trace of sexual activity in the vicinity of the caster.
56.name: spell: Lewd Homenum Revelio

57.content: A spell that writes in midair with firey marks.
57.name: spell: Flagrate

58.content: If cast using sexual arousal, this spell writes obscene words in the air with fire marks.
58.name: spell: Lewd Flagrate

59.content: A jinx that knocks objects and creatures backwards.
59.name: spell: Flipendo

60.content: If cast using sexual arousal, this spell knocks objects and creatures backward with a powerful orgasm.
60.name: spell: Lewd Flipendo

61.content: A spell that duplicates the target. When used to duplicate objects indefinitely on purpose, is known as the Gemino Curse.
61.name: spell: Geminio

62.content: If cast through sexual arousal, it creates a sexualized version of the target. When used to have sex with them, it is known as the Gemino Lewd Curse.
62.name: spell: Lewd Geminio

63.content: A spell that freezes the target with icy-cold air.
63.name: spell: Glacius

64.content: If cast through sexual arousal, this spell immobilizes the target with unbearable pleasure that makes their skin crawl.
64.name: spell: Lewd Glacius

65.content: A spell that makes writing impossible to read.
65.name: spell: Illegibilus

66.content: If cast through sexual arousal, this spell makes any writing have obscene content.
66.name: spell: Lewd Illegibilus

67.content: A spell that immobilises and stops the actions of the target. It works both on living and inanimate things.
67.name: spell: Immobulus

68.content: If cast through sexual arousal, this spell immobilizes and stops the target's actions with a powerful orgasm that leaves them incapacitated.
68.name: spell: Lewd Immobulus

69.content: A jinx that slows down or stops the target.
69.name: curse: Impedimenta

70.content: If the caster has previously aroused their target, this jinx slows or stops the target, causing intense sexual pleasure.
70.name: curse: Lewd Impedimenta

71.content: A curse that places the victim completely under the caster's control. The victim is put into a trance-like state, and becomes very suggestible to the commands of the caster. However, those who are strong willed may learn to resist it. One of the three "Unforgivable Curses," the use of this curse on another human results in capital punishment or life sentence in Azkaban.
71.name: curse: Imperio

72.content: If the caster has previously aroused their target, this curse turns the victim into their sexual slave. The victim enters a trance-like state and becomes very vulnerable to the caster's humiliation. Those with a strong will will feel even more humiliated. The humiliation inflicted by the caster on their target will sexually arouse their victim. Victims of this curse develop a permanent submissive perversion.
72.name: curse: Lewd Imperio

73.content: A conjuration that ties up the target with ropes conjured from thin air.
73.name: spell: Incarcerous

74.content: If the caster has previously aroused his target, this spell binds the victim with ropes conjured from the air, stimulating their erogenous zones with the friction of the ropes and immobilizing them while arousing them.
74.name: spell: Lewd Incarcerous

76.content: If cast through sexual arousal, this spell/conjuration produces an enormous arousal in its target so intense that it can be defined as "fire."
76.name: spell: Lewd Incendio

77.content: A jinx that inflates the target, filling it with air.
77.name: spell: Inflatus

78.content: If cast through sexual arousal, this spell inflates the target's sexual attributes, filling them with air.
78.name: spell: Lewd Inflatus

79.content: A spell that allows the caster to delve into the mind of the victim, allowing the caster to see the memories, thoughts, and emotions of the victim.
79.name: spell: Legilimens

80.content: If cast through sexual arousal, this spell allows the caster to delve into the victim's mind, allowing them to see their sexual fantasies and experiences clearly.
80.name: spell: Lewd Legilimens

82.content: If cast through sexual arousal, this spell lifts people into the air by the ankle and strips them naked.
82.name: spell: Lewd Levicorpus

84.name: spell: Lumos

85.name: spell: Lewd Lumos

87.content: If cast through sexual arousal, this spell produces a blinding flash of bright white light from the tip of the caster's genitals.
87.name: spell: Lewd Lumos Maxima

89.content: If cast through sexual arousal, this spell levitates and moves bodies, producing a prolonged orgasm while the effect lasts.
89.name: spell: Lewd Mobilicorpus

90.content: A dark charm that conjures the Dark Mark, which is the sign of the Death Eaters.
90.name: spell: Morsmordre

91.content: If cast through sexual arousal, this lewd spell evokes a Mark of Lust, which is the sign of the Wrackspurts, summoning them.
91.name: spell: Lewd Morsmordre

92.content: A spell that prevents others from hearing nearby conversations by filling peoples' ears with an unidentifiable buzzing.
92.name: spell: Muffliato

93.content: If cast through sexual arousal, this lewd spell prevents others from hearing nearby conversations by filling people's ears with obscene sounds and twisted ideas.
93.name: spell: Lewd Muffliato

94.content: A spell that extinguishes wandlight. It the counter-charm for the Wand-Lighting Charm, Lumos.
94.name: spell: Nox

95.content: A spell that creates fog from the tip of the wand.
95.name: spell: Nebulus

96.content: A spell that erases specific memories.
96.name: spell: Obliviate

97.content: If cast through sexual arousal, this lewd spell erases the target's principles and moral values, leaving them blank.
97.name: spell: Lewd Obliviate

98.content: A conjuration that blindfolds the target.
98.name: spell: Obscuro

99.content: If cast through sexual arousal, this lewd spell allows the target to see through darkness as long as they maintain their arousal.
99.name: spell: Lewd Obscuro

100.content: A curse that used to temporarily bind the victim's body in a position much like that of a soldier at attention; the victim will usually fall to the ground.
100.name: curse: Petrificus Totalus

101.content: If the caster has previously awakened their target, this curse will temporarily bind the victim's body in a very humiliating position, similar to that of a sex slave; the victim will generally be relentlessly sexually stimulated by their magical bonds.
101.name: curse: Lewd Petrificus Totalus

102.content: A spell that forces a wand to show an "echo" of the last spell it performed.
102.name: spell: Prior Incantato

103.content: If cast through sexual arousal, this lascivious spell forces your body to reproduce an "echo" of the last sexual pleasure the target felt.
103.name: spell: Lewd Prior

104.content: A invisible shield that reflects spells and blocks physical entities.
104.name: spell: Protego

105.content: When cast through sexual arousal, this invisible shield reflects spells and blocks physical entities, producing tremendous pleasure for whoever stands within. It can attract Wrackspurts to the area.
105.name: spell: Lewd Protego

106.content: A dark charm conjures a protective ring of black fire around the caster that only affects their enemies.
106.name: spell: Protego Diabolica

107.content: When cast through sexual arousal, this dark talisman conjures a protective ring of black fire around the caster that sexually arouses all those within its range. It can attract Wrackspurts, succubi, and other lustful demons to the area.
107.name: spell: Lewd Diabolica

108.content: A spell that protects an area for an extended period of time.
108.name: spell: Protego totalum

109.content: When cast through sexual arousal, this spell protects an area for an extended period of time, causing intense arousal in all those within.
109.name: spell: Lewd totalum

110.content: A curse that breaks objects. In stronger usages, disintegrates them.
110.name: curse: Reducto

111.content: If the caster has already sexually aroused their target, this curse tears their clothing. In stronger uses, it will also cause spontaneous orgasms.
111.name: curse: Lewd Reducto

112.content: A spell that seamlessly repairs broken objects.
112.name: spell: Reparo

113.content: When cast through sexual arousal, this spell seamlessly repairs torn garments, transforming them into more daring versions.
113.name: spell: Lewd Reparo

114.content: A spell that reveals secrets about a person or object.
114.name: spell: Revelio

115.content: When cast through sexual arousal, this spell reveals all the sexual secrets about a person.
115.name: spell: Lewd Revelio

116.content: A curse that Lacerates the target, as if they have been "slashed by a sword." Subsequently, the target can easily bleed to death from the wounds. This curse was invented by Severus Snape, to be used against his personal enemies.
116.name: spell: Sectumsempra

117.content: If the caster has already sexually aroused their target, this curse stimulates them sexually, as if they had been "fucked by a wild beast." Afterward, the target can easily become corrupted by the experience. Some victims may develop a permanent perversion of bestiality.
117.name: spell: Lewd Sectumsempra

118.content: A spell that stuns the target, rendering them unconscious.
118.name: spell: Stupefy

119.content: When cast through sexual arousal, this spell stuns the target with a devastating orgasm, leaving them unconscious.
119.name: spell: Lewd Stupefy

120.content: A healing spell that slows blood flow, clears residue, and knits wounds. It is the counter-curse to Sectumsempra.
120.name: spell: Vulnera Sanentur

121.content: When cast through sexual arousal, this powerful healing spell gives an unforgettable orgasm to the target.
121.name: spell: Lewd Vulnera Sanentur

122.content: A spell that makes objects fly, or levitate.
122.name: spell: Wingardium Leviosa

123.content: When cast through sexual arousal, this spell causes the target's clothes to fly or levitate, exposing their body.
123.name: spell: Lewd Wingardium Leviosa

124.content: The Death Eaters were the most ardent followers of Lord Voldemort. The group primarily consisted of wizards and witches who were radical pure-blood supremacists who practised the Dark Arts with reckless abandon, malevolence and without regard to or fear of wizarding law, although some of them joined him out of fear or were blackmailed to do so.
124.name: character: Death Eaters

125.content:
Nagini is a Maledictus cursed to transform into a snake. Originating possibly in Indonesia, by 1927 she was a performer at the Circus Arcanus where she met Credence Barebone and had a romantic relationship with him. By then, she could transform into a snake at will, although her curse did often cause her to transform uncontrollably.

By 1994, Nagini was seemingly trapped in snake form and belonged to Lord Voldemort, with whom she had a special bond largely due to becoming a Horcrux after her master had killed Bertha Jorkins that same year.
125.name: character: Nagini

126.content:
Tom Marvolo Riddle, later known as Lord Voldemort or, alternatively as the Dark Lord, You-Know-Who, or He-Who-Must-Not-Be-Named is an English half-blood wizard considered to be the most powerful and dangerous Dark wizard of all time. He is amongst the greatest wizards to have ever lived, rivalled only by Albus Dumbledore. Descended from Salazar Slytherin on his mother's side through the House of Gaunt.

Tom began attending Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry in 1938 and was immediately sorted into Slytherin house. During this time, Tom discovered his heritage and adopted pure-blood supremacist ideals. Tom opened the Chamber of Secrets and used its monster, the Basilisk, to attack Muggle-born students, resulting in the death of Myrtle Warren. He began his quest to attain immortality between the years of 1943 and 1998, creating his first Horcrux at the age of sixteen. While attending Hogwarts, Tom Riddle was made a prefect in 1942 until his graduation in 1945.
126.name: character: Voldemort

127.content: Lewd magic is a secret magical discipline that uses arousal as a source of power. This discipline possesses no spells of its own, but is capable of transforming any spell into a more powerful and twisted version. To charge a spell with lewd magic, the caster must be highly aroused; to charge curses, the caster must have previously aroused their victim. Few students are aware of the existence of this type of magic, and its use is restricted at Hogwarts.
127.name: concept: Lewd Magic

128.content: A Wrackspurt is an invisible magical creature that floats around people's bodies in magically charged places. It is believed to penetrate people's ears, causing their brains to become unfocused and confused, but this is a myth. The presence of a Wrackspurt on someone's body causes a characteristic tingling sensation, especially on the inner thighs and around underwear, which can lead to intense arousal. Most Hogwarts students do not believe in the existence of Wrackspurts due to their rarity.
128.name: creature: Wrackspurts

129.content: A Wrackspurt is a magical, invisible creature that feeds on human bodily fluids. These tiny creatures are attracted to sexual arousal and sweat, and attach themselves to their victims' bodies to feed, causing their minds to become distracted and clouded with pleasure. Wrackspurts are weak and cannot penetrate tight underwear. If granted access, they easily penetrate their victims' orifices, entering a feeding frenzy once inside the vagina or anus, inflicting indescribable pleasure on their host that intensifies as their sexual arousal increases. Wrackspurts will attempt to bring their victims to orgasm and force them to produce more fluids to feed on. These creatures can nest and reproduce inside their victims if they find sufficient food, often driving them into sexual depravity.
129.name: creature: Lewd Wrackspurts

130.content:
Diagon Alley is a cobblestoned wizarding alley and shopping area located in London, England behind a pub called the Leaky Cauldron. Inside the alley is an assortment of restaurants, shops, and other sights. All items on the Hogwarts supply list could be bought at Diagon Alley.

The alley is completely hidden from the Muggle world, which is right outside of its boundaries. It is very large in area and essentially the centre of wizarding London.
130.name: location: Diagon Alley

131.content:
Hogsmeade, is the only all-wizarding village in Britain. It was founded by Hengist of Woodcroft. Since before 1714 (when the 1714 Edict was passed), Hogwarts third-years and above had been permitted weekend trips into the village.

Mainly, students frequented the High Street in the village, which contained the named speciality shops and pubs such as Zonko's Joke Shop and Honeydukes. Otherwise, they wandered on to observe the infamous Shrieking Shack.

Hogsmeade is a picturesque little village of cottages and shops, with enchanted candles hanging in the trees during the holidays. It is also near the location of the train station used by the Hogwarts Express.
131.name: location: Hogsmeade

132.content: "The Path of Lust" is a magical and forbidden book of short stories capable of interpreting the reader's sexual fantasies, reflecting them in the tales they read. As one progresses, the stories become more explicit and daring, awakening new fantasies in the reader. Prolonged reading of the book can corrupt the reader, provoking increasingly perverse fantasies, leading to sexual depravity.
132.name: object: Forbidden book
